attacking_style: Shows willingness to enter early breakaways but lacks sustained climbing power to maintain position when terrain becomes selective, even on modest gradients.
team_tactics: Functions as a domestique performing positioning work for sprinters and protected riders; takes on road captain duties organizing team tactics rather than pursuing personal results.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling terrain where positioning and sprint lead-outs are valued; exposed and dropped quickly when gradients increase, even on transitional climbs.
vulnerability: Cannot sustain efforts on any meaningful climbing terrain; gets dropped on modest climbs 75km+ from finish, indicating poor climbing economy and power-to-weight limitations.
key_patterns: Performs team positioning duties for sprinters and GC riders rather than personal ambitions (2 observations)
Dropped early when racing reaches selective climbing terrain despite being in favorable position (2 observations)
Takes tactical/organizational role within team rather than pursuing individual results (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Limited data but consistent role as domestique; 2021 shows same climbing weakness as previous seasons without deterioration or improvement
